description: Ambient, melodic techno and neo-classical vinyl from the last two decades, sourced from Rob's label list. Labels define membership; the genre names describe the slice.
decidedBy: Rob, 2026-07-10 (issue #9). One deviation from his verbatim list under the standing best-judgment authorization: 'Ki' sharpened to 'Ki Records' after plain 'Ki' matched unrelated entities (Par-ki-lee Publishing, Ki/oon) — recorded in the issue close-out.
